description: Discount coupon code application at checkout
acceptance_criteria: Add at least one product to cart from seed data.
Locate coupon input field with data-testid='coupon-input' and apply button with data-testid='coupon-apply'.
Enter valid coupon code from seed data (e.g., 'WELCOME10') and click apply.
Verify total price updates correctly with discount applied, shown in data-testid='cart-total'.
Verify discount amount displays separately with data-testid='discount-amount'.
Enter invalid coupon code and verify error message with data-testid='coupon-error'.
Enter expired coupon code and verify appropriate error message.
Remove coupon and verify total reverts to original price.
Verify coupon cannot be applied to orders below minimum threshold if defined in seed data.
